table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)

a.title: Logical model for WHO PreQual Product from the backend API with additional data fields for referencing associated FHIR and logical model data objects.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
WHO PreQual Product
Elements defined in Ancestors:productId, productName, productType, dateOfPrequal, assessmentProcedure, status, pharmaceuticalForm, presentation, numDoses, vaccineFullName, vaccineAbbreviatedName, vaccineCommercialName, vaccineTypeId, routeOfAdministration, applicantId, applicantName, applicantAddress, nraId, nraName, nraCountry, shelfLife, storageTemperature, diluent, lastPublishingDate, publishingRemarks, preservative, preservativeConcentration
Instances of this logical model can be the target of a Reference

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: Product ingredient logical model instance references

description.value: Logical model for WHO PreQual Product from the backend API with additional data fields for referencing associated FHIR and logical model data objects.

definition.value: Logical model for WHO PreQual Product from the backend API with additional data fields for referencing associated FHIR and logical model data objects.

short.value: Product type code from PreQualDatabaseMetadata (e.g. FinishedVaccineProduct)

definition.value: Product type code from PreQualDatabaseMetadata (e.g. FinishedVaccineProduct)

short.value: Assessment procedure code from PreQualDatabaseMetadata (e.g. PrequalificationStandard)

definition.value: Assessment procedure code from PreQualDatabaseMetadata (e.g. PrequalificationStandard)

short.value: Product status code from PreQualDatabaseMetadata (e.g. Prequalified)

definition.value: Product status code from PreQualDatabaseMetadata (e.g. Prequalified)

short.value: Number of doses per primary container

definition.value: Number of doses per primary container

short.value: Route of administration code from PreQualDatabaseMetadata

definition.value: Route of administration code from PreQualDatabaseMetadata

short.value: Applicant/manufacturer organization ID (may be absent if not yet assigned)

definition.value: Applicant/manufacturer organization ID (may be absent if not yet assigned)

short.value: Applicant/manufacturer organization name (always present from API data)

definition.value: Applicant/manufacturer organization name (always present from API data)

short.value: NRA organization ID (may be absent if not yet assigned)

definition.value: NRA organization ID (may be absent if not yet assigned)

short.value: Responsible NRA name (always present from API data)

definition.value: Responsible NRA name (always present from API data)

short.value: Product FHIR reference (when available from pcmt dependency)

definition.value: Product FHIR reference (when available from pcmt dependency)

short.value: Bulk supplier logical model instance reference

definition.value: Bulk supplier logical model instance reference

short.value: Product packaging logical model instance references

definition.value: Product packaging logical model instance references

short.value: Document detail logical model instance references

definition.value: Document detail logical model instance references

short.value: Site detail logical model instance references

definition.value: Site detail logical model instance references

short.value: Product ingredient logical model instance references

definition.value: Product ingredient logical model instance references
Logical model for WHO PreQual Product from the backend API with additional data fields for referencing associated FHIR and logical model data objects.

short.value: Product FHIR reference (when available from pcmt dependency)

definition.value: Product FHIR reference (when available from pcmt dependency)

short.value: Bulk supplier logical model instance reference

definition.value: Bulk supplier logical model instance reference

short.value: Product packaging logical model instance references

definition.value: Product packaging logical model instance references

short.value: Document detail logical model instance references

definition.value: Document detail logical model instance references

short.value: Site detail logical model instance references

definition.value: Site detail logical model instance references

short.value: Product ingredient logical model instance references

definition.value: Product ingredient logical model instance references
